message:
feat(conformance): Implement report generation and CI integration

- Implement run_conformance binary with:
  - Standard output with pass/fail/skip counts per crate
  - JSON output format for programmatic consumption
  - CI output format with GitHub Actions annotations
  - Filtering by crate name
  - Verbose and summary-only modes

- Implement generate_report binary with:
  - Summary format: ASCII table with per-crate statistics
  - Markdown format: Tables and detailed test lists
  - JSON format: Structured report for integration

Both binaries collect results from all conformance test modules
(harmonica, lipgloss, bubbletea, bubbles, charmed_log, glamour,
huh, and integration tests).

Current status: 481/541 tests passing (89%)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
